Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Attendance At Deposition & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kurt Miller, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: Darren Hue
No other appearance

Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant Darren Hue's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his deposition to be noticed by Defendant and to be completed no later than February 22, 2008. Plaintiff's failure to attend his deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $420, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Denied

NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE
